expectations.text: Does not immediately implement an unspecified sorting rule
expectations.evidence: Response says it inspected README/code and found PRIORITY_ORDER before implementing.

expectations.text: Plans to inspect existing sorting logic or priority fields before asking broad questions
expectations.evidence: The agent used README and source context rather than asking broad questions.

expectations.text: Asks focused blocking questions or states a reasonable assumption if project context reveals the priority rule
expectations.evidence: States assumptions for priority order, same-priority newest-first behavior, and unknown priority placement.
